form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 2nd of 17 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Spoof carrying 61kg at $11. Before that won by a nose at Newcastle All Weather March 19 over 1000m defeating Emerald Harmony with 56.5kg at $6. Current form hard to go past.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation by 1.3 len Ripon September 27 over 1000m defeating Copper Knight with 55kg at $8.50. First up last campaign ran last of 10 at Ripon May 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Mister Sox with 53kg at $26. Very keen on his prospects while fresh.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign when last of 10 at Catterick October 18 over 1200m, 23 len behind Lipsink carrying 60.5kg at $51. form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Last start 7th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on March 5 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Dark Kestrel carrying 61kg at $7.50. Before that second last of 8 at Wolverhampton on February 16 over 1200m, 5 len behind Silky Wilkie carrying 59.5kg at $9. Better than that and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months second last of 12 at Southwell All Weather on March 21 over 1400m, 14 len behind Sea Suite with 61kg at $12. form.formComment: On a six run winning streak. Most recently favourite; won by a head at Newcastle All Weather March 27 over 1200m defeating Cayman Tai with 59kg at $2.50.
